command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && echo '--- Audit summary ---' && python3 -c "
import json
from pathlib import Path
AUDIT_DIR = Path('/opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance')
counts = {}
for af in AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*.json'):
    try:
        rec = json.loads(af.read_text())
        rt = rec.get('record_type','unknown')
        counts[rt] = counts.get(rt,0) + 1
    except: pass
total = sum(counts.values())
pass_count = len(list(AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*-PASS.json')))
fail_count = len(list(AUDIT_DIR.glob('sentinel-*-FAIL.json')))
print(f'Total audit records: {total} (PASS={pass_count}, FAIL={fail_count})')
print('9E.6 record types:')
for k,v in sorted(counts.items()):
    if v > 0: print(f'  {k}: {v}')
" && echo '--- Stream ---' && ls memory/shared-events/stream/ && echo '--- Live artifacts ---' && ls memory/shared-events/gap-reports/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 && ls memory/shared-events/workspaces/ 2>/dev/null | head -5
